# rednil.at

> Personal website of Michael Linder, Solutions Architect and owner of Strali Solutions e.U., based in Carinthia, Austria.

## About

Michael Linder is an IT consultant and solutions architect specializing in software architecture, AI integration, Microsoft 365, and DevOps. He currently works as a Senior Solutions Architect for a DAX-listed semiconductor company and runs Strali Solutions e.U., providing IT consulting for SMEs in the DACH region.

## Site Structure

- [About](https://rednil.at/ueber-mich): Background, experience, personal info
- [Projects](https://rednil.at/projekte): Client and side projects
- [Blog](https://rednil.at/blog): Technical articles on AI, software architecture, and enterprise IT
- [Contact](https://rednil.at/kontakt): Email, LinkedIn, X

## Key Topics

- Software Architecture & Enterprise IT
- AI Integration (RAG, Copilot, Claude, Agents)
- AI Governance & EU AI Act
- Microsoft 365 & SharePoint
- Amateur Radio (OE8YML)
